creator: pi@opsec.eu
text:
Hi!

Patch misses pkg-plist fix.

Included is the new patch.

--------

diff -r -u multimedia/libbluray/Makefile /usr/home/pi/myp/multimedia/libbluray/Makefile
--- multimedia/libbluray/Makefile	2013-01-01 15:32:34.000000000 +0100
+++ /usr/home/pi/myp/multimedia/libbluray/Makefile	2013-04-14 13:45:13.000000000 +0200
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	libbluray
-PORTVERSION=	0.2.2
+PORTVERSION=	0.2.3
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	multimedia
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.videolan.org/pub/videolan/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION}/ \
diff -r -u multimedia/libbluray/distinfo /usr/home/pi/myp/multimedia/libbluray/distinfo
--- multimedia/libbluray/distinfo	2013-01-01 15:32:34.000000000 +0100
+++ /usr/home/pi/myp/multimedia/libbluray/distinfo	2013-04-14 13:45:20.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (libbluray-0.2.2.tar.bz2) = 46fa6ff8b18b66cb478a081981a61230fd3909e1a867eaf81325569224da7173
-SIZE (libbluray-0.2.2.tar.bz2) = 456025
+SHA256 (libbluray-0.2.3.tar.bz2) = 2c65cfb02aeec31721f9ea65ee2c085a9bfe163e99dd01b52ccb3f53ba205eea
+SIZE (libbluray-0.2.3.tar.bz2) = 465239
diff -r -u multimedia/libbluray/pkg-plist /usr/home/pi/myp/multimedia/libbluray/pkg-plist
--- multimedia/libbluray/pkg-plist	2013-01-01 15:32:34.000000000 +0100
+++ /usr/home/pi/myp/multimedia/libbluray/pkg-plist	2013-04-14 14:53:14.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
+bin/bd_info
 include/libbluray/bluray-version.h
 include/libbluray/bluray.h
 include/libbluray/clpi_data.h
@@ -9,6 +10,6 @@
 lib/libbluray.a
 lib/libbluray.la
 lib/libbluray.so
-lib/libbluray.so.2
+lib/libbluray.so.3
 libdata/pkgconfig/libbluray.pc
 @dirrm include/libbluray
--------

-- 
pi@opsec.eu            +49 171 3101372                         7 years to go !
